text:
As someone that manages to listen to many different music styles, sometimes its hard to pick the best song from a band or a singer or a DJ. 

Strangely enough even though Iron Maiden have an amazing collection of albums you can listen from start to finish, this song is not just my favourite Iron Maiden song, its my favourite song of all-time. And its sad that bands of today are not able to replicate the brilliance of bands like Iron Maiden, Metallica, Led Zeppelin, Pink Floyd, Black Sabbath and if they are they are unknown by the masses.
The saying they dont make them like they used to should not have to be used in music.

text:
Absolute fire. Absolute masterpiece.
Here's the lyrics, buddies.



I'm waiting in my cold cell when the bell begins to chime
Reflecting on my past life and it doesn't have much time
'Cause at 5 o'clock, they take me to the Gallows Pole
The sands of time for me are running low
Running low, yeah!
When the priest comes to read me the last rites
Take a look through the bars at the last sights
Of a world that has gone very wrong for me
Can it be that there's some sort of error?
Hard to stop the surmounting terror
Is it really the end, not some crazy dream?
Somebody, please tell me that I'm dreaming
It's not easy to stop from screaming
The words escape me when I try to speak
Tears flow, but why am I crying?
After all, I'm not afraid of dying
Don't I believe that there never is an end?
As the guards march me out to the courtyard
Somebody cries from a cell, "God be with you"
If there's a God, why has he let me go?
As I walk, my life drifts before me
Though the end is near I'm not sorry
Catch my soul, it's willing to fly away
Mark my words, believe my soul lives on
Don't worry now that I have gone
I've gone beyond to seek the truth
When you know that your time is close at hand
Maybe then you'll begin to understand
Life down here is just a strange illusion
Yeah-yeah-yeah, hallowed be thy name
Yeah-yeah-yeah, hallowed by thy name
Yeah

text:
I'm waiting in my cold cell when the bell begins to chime
Reflecting on my past life and it doesn't have much time
'Cause at 5 o'clock, they take me to the Gallows Pole
The sands of time for me are running low
Running low, yeah!
When the priest comes to read me the last rites
Take a look through the bars at the last sights
Of a world that has gone very wrong for me
Can it be that there's some sort of error?
Hard to stop the surmounting terror
Is it really the end, not some crazy dream?
Somebody, please tell me that I'm dreaming
It's not easy to stop from screaming
The words escape me when I try to speak
Tears flow, but why am I crying?
After all, I'm not afraid of dying
Don't I believe that there never is an end?
As the guards march me out to the courtyard
Somebody cries from a cell, "God be with you"
If there's a God, why has he let me go?
As I walk, my life drifts before me
Though the end is near I'm not sorry
Catch my soul, it's willing to fly away
Mark my words, believe my soul lives on
Don't worry now that I have gone
I've gone beyond to seek the truth
When you know that your time is close at hand
Maybe then you'll begin to understand
Life down here is just a strange illusion
Yeah-yeah-yeah, hallowed be thy name
Yeah-yeah-yeah, hallowed by thy name
Yeah

text:
vieram lágrimas aos meus olhos...
Sua história é muito representativa em muitos aspectos.
Não consigo me considerar um seguidor de metal - embora na minha juventude não existisse mais nada, apenas metal. Eu conheci essa música no meu período mais selvagem de crescimento. Agora estou com quase 50'
Mas mesmo agora, depois de tanto tempo, essa música é uma das melhores se você quiser experimentar sua tempestade interior.
Infelizmente a tempestade está crescendo.
A Europa tornou-se algo que não chega nem perto do que era antes - mas esta é uma história diferente!
Você experimentará muitas coisas em sua vida - e desejo que tenha uma vida longa e feliz.
Você verá coisas que irão mudar você.
Mas esta música vai lembrar de você - de onde você vem e para onde está indo agora - suas respostas vão te encontrar! 

/ 

came tears to my eyes...
Your story is very representative in many ways.
I cannot name myself as a metal-follower - alltough in my young ages it  not existed anything else, only metal. I knew this song in my wildest period of growth. I'm now almost 50'
But even now after so many time - this song is one of the greatest if you want to experience your inner storm.
Unfortunately the storm is growing.
Europe became something that it get not even close what it was once - but this is a different story!
You will experience many things in your life - and I wish you have a happy and long life.
You will see things that will change you.
But this music will remember you - where you come from and where you're heading right now - your answers will find you!

text:
I'm waiting in my cold cell when the bell begins to chime

When you know that your time is close at hand

text:
If you think past 30 or so that the death penalty is any issue compared to just plain lifelong prison (or just 10 years, probably in most cases much less), you probably have a serious lack of imagination, to start with.

That it never seems to come up (though such an ethical topic seems outdated now anyway)how just prison is obviously much , much worse (little hint: many think normal or even a darn great life is worse than death), and has just been kept quiet without any remark whatsoever, seems to have never been anything else than a sardonic little joke. And I do think this is now general knowledge, but still not explicitly mentioned, of course.
(P.S.: No, I have not been, it is just so obvious whenever I pay attention to sentencings.)

I'm waiting in my cold cell when the bell begins to chime

When you know that your time is close at hand

Life down here is just a strange illusion

Yeah-yeah-yeah, hallowed by thy name

text:
Hallowed By Thy Name
아버지의 이름이 거룩히 여김을 받으시옵소서 (주기도문의 구절)
I'm waiting in my cold cell, when the bell begins to chime
(차가운 감방안에서 벨이 울리기 시작할 때만을 기다리고 있지)
Reflecting on my past life, and it doesn't have much time
(지난 과거를 돌아보기엔 시간이 많지 않아)
'Cause at 5 o'clock, they take me to the Gallows pole
(왜냐하면 5시 정각에, 그들은 날 교수대로 데려갈꺼니까)
The sands of time, for me are running low...
(운명의 시간이여, 날 위해 천천히 가다오...)
Mother fuckers!
(망할 것들!)
Running low...
(천천히 가다오...)

When the priest comes to read me the last rights
(신부님이 마지막 성경말씀을 읽어주러 오실때)
I take a look through the bars at the last sights
(창살을 통해 보여지는 마지막 광경을 보겠지)
Of a world that has gone very wrong for me...
(나에겐 매우 불공평했던 세상말야...)
Could it be that there's some sort of error?
(뭔가 실수가 있었던가?)
Hard to stop the surmounting terror
(덮쳐오는 공포를 극복하기가 어려워)
Is it really the end or some crazy dream?
(이제 정말 끝인건가 아님 엉터리같은 꿈인거야?)
Somebody please tell me that I'm dreaming
(누군가 제발 나에게 이게 꿈이라고 말해줘)
It's not easy to stop from screaming
(비명을 지르고 싶은 걸 멈출 수가 없어)
Words escape me when I try to speak...
(말을 하려고 해보지만 말이 나오지 않아)
Tears, they flow; but why am I crying?
(눈물, 눈물은 흐르지만 내가 왜 우는거야?)
After all, I'm not afraid of dying
(결국에는, 난 죽음을 두려워 하지 않아.)
Do not believe that there never is an end...
(끝이란 없다는 걸 믿지 말아)

As the guards bring me out to the courtyard
(간수들이 날 법정에 세울때)
Somebody cries from a cell, "God be with you!"
(누군가 강방안에서 울부짖었어, "신의 가호가 함께 하길!"이라고)
If there's a god then why does he let me die?
(신이 있다면 왜 날 죽게 내버려 두는거지?)
As I walk, all my life drifts before me
(걸을 때 마다, 내 모든 인생이 내 앞을 스쳐갔어)
And though the end is near, I'm not sorry
(그리고 종말이 가까이 왔지, 난 후회하지 않아.)
Catch my soul, it's willing to fly away...
(내 영혼을 가져가, 내 영혼은 멀리 날아갈꺼야)
Mark my words, believe my soul lives on
(내 말을 명심해, 내 영혼이 살아 있다는 걸 믿어)
Don't worry, now that I have gone
(걱정마, 지금 난 가)
I've gone beyond to see the truth...
(진실을 보기 위해서 가)
So when you know that your time is close at hand
(자, 네 시간이 네 손에 쥐어졌을때)
Maybe then you'll begin to understand
(아마도 넌 이해하게 될거야)
Life down there is just a strange illusion...
(그 아래 삶이란 단지 이상한 환상일 뿐인 것을)

text:
Jesus warned us of times like these, when the world would fall into a state like it was before the great flood. Evil will abound, love will grow cold, there will be great deception and great tribulation, such as never seen before and never to be seen again. These are dark times but there is hope in Jesus Christ, so I would like to share the good news with anyone who has a heart to listen:

Matthew @: "Come unto me, all ye that labour and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest"


Matthew @-40: "Master, which is the great commandment in the law? Jesus said unto him, Thou shalt love the Lord thy God with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy mind. This is the first and great commandment. And the second is like unto it, Thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself. On these two commandments hang all the law and the prophets"

Matthew @-48: "Ye have heard that it hath been said, Thou shalt love thy neighbour, and hate thine enemy. But I say unto you, Love your enemies, bless them that curse you, do good to them that hate you, and pray for them which despitefully use you, and persecute you; That ye may be the children of your Father which is in heaven: for he maketh his sun to rise on the evil and on the good, and sendeth rain on the just and on the unjust"

Luke 13:1-3: "There were present at that season some that told him of the Galilaeans, whose blood Pilate had mingled with their sacrifices. And Jesus answering said unto them, Suppose ye that these Galilaeans were sinners above all the Galilaeans, because they suffered such things? I tell you, Nay: but, except ye repent, ye shall all likewise perish"

John @: "Jesus answered and said unto him, If a man love me, he will keep my words: and my Father will love him, and we will come unto him, and make our abode with him"

1 John 4:9: "In this was manifested the  love of God toward us, because that God sent his only begotten Son into the world, that we might live through him"

Galatians @: "I am crucified with Christ: nevertheless I live; yet not I, but Christ liveth in me: and the life which I now live in the flesh I live by the faith of the Son of God, who loved me, and gave himself for me" 

Ephesians 2:7-9: "That in the ages to come he might shew the exceeding riches of his grace in his kindness toward us through Christ Jesus. For by grace are ye saved through faith; and that not of yourselves: it is the gift of God: Not of works, lest any man should boast"

Revelation 21:3-5: "And I heard a great voice out of heaven saying, Behold, the tabernacle of God is with men, and he will dwell with them, and they shall be his people, and God himself shall be with them, and be their God. And God shall wipe away all tears from their eyes; and there shall be no more death, neither sorrow, nor crying, neither shall there be any more pain: for the former things are passed away. And he that sat upon the throne said, Behold, I make all things new"

Thank you Lord Jesus.

text:
[Intro]
I'm waiting in my cold cell, when the bell begins to chime
Reflecting on my past life and it doesn't have much time
Cause at 5 o'clock they take me to the Gallows Pole
The sands of time for me are running low
Running low, yeah

[Verse 1]
When the priest comes to read me the last rites
I take a look to the bars at the last sights
Of a world that has gone very wrong for me

Can it be that there's some sort of error?
Hard to stop the surmounting terror
Is it really the end, not some crazy dream?

[Verse 2]
Somebody please tell me that I'm dreaming
It's not easy to stop from screaming
But words escape me when I try to speak

Tears fall but why am I crying?
After all I'm not afraid of dying
Don't I believe that there never is an end?

[Verse 3]
As the guards march me out to the courtyard
Somebody cries from a cell "God be with you"
If there's a God why has He let me go?

As I walk my life drifts before me
And though the end is near I'm not sorry
Catch my soul, it's willing to fly away

[Verse 4]
Mark my words believe my soul lives on
Don't worry now that I have gone
I've gone beyond to seek the truth

When you know that your time is close at hand
Maybe then you'll begin to understand
Life down here is just a strange illusion

[Guitar solo: Dave Murray]
[Guitar solo: Adrian Smith]

[Outro]
Yeah, yeah, yeah... Hallowed be Thy name
Yeah, yeah, yeah... Hallowed be Thy name
Yeah

text:
Hallowed be thy name 

I'm waiting in my cold cell, when the bell begins to chime
Reflecting on my past life and it doesn't have much time
'Cause at 5 o'clock they take me to the gallows pole
The sands of time for me are running low

When the priest comes to read me the last rites
I take a look through the bars at the last sights
Of a world that has gone very wrong for me

Can it be that there's some sort of error
Hard to stop the surmounting terror
Is it really the end, not some crazy dream?

Somebody please tell me that I'm dreaming
It's not so easy to stop from screaming
But words escape me when I try to speak

Tears flow but why am I crying
After all I'm not afraid of dying
Don't I believe that there never is an end

As the guards march me out to the courtyard
Somebody cries from a cell: God be with you
If there's a god then why has he let me go?

As I walk all my life drifts before me
Though the end is near I'm still not sorry
Catch my soul, it's willing to fly away

Mark my words please believe my soul lives on
Please don't worry now that I have gone
I've gone beyond to see the truth

When you know that your time is close at hand
Maybe then you'll begin to understand
Life down here is just a strange illusion

Hallowed be thy name

I hear all of these Iron Maiden classics since the 90s, when i became a metalhead and a classic rock enthusiast. What's so special about Nicko drums? The previous one (Clive Burr) was much more skilled than him.

I was so used to listen to Neil Peart, John Bonham, Ian Paice, Bill Ward, ‎Mike Portnoy‎... that when i heard Nicko, i just could think: "meh, he is average".

I'm waiting in my cold cell when the bell begins to chime
Reflecting on my past life and it doesn't have much time

The sands of time for me are running low, yeah!

When the priest comes to read me the last rites
I take a look through the bars at the last sights
Of a world that has gone very wrong for me

Can it be that there's some sort of error
Hard to stop the surmounting terror
Is it really the end, not some crazy dream?

Somebody please tell me that I'm dreaming

After all I'm not afraid of dying

Catch my soul, it's willing to fly away

Mark my words, believe my soul lives on
Don't worry now that I have gone
I've gone beyond to seek the truth

When you know that your time is close at hand

Life down here is just a strange illusion
Yeah, hallowed be thy name
Yeah, hallowed by thy name
Yeah
